scripts.decks:compile: bun run --cwd ../../packages/decks build && node ../../packages/decks/dist/bin.js compile --root decks --out src/generated --mount /decks
scripts.decks:compile:dev: bun run --cwd ../../packages/decks build -- --clean=false && node ../../packages/decks/dist/bin.js compile --root decks --out src/generated --mount /decks
scripts.dev: bun run decks:compile:dev && CI=1 XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler-config wrangler dev --var DECK_RUNTIME_DEV:true
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test
